product_overview: An AI-powered PC builder and recommendation system for the Bangladeshi market. It helps users define a purpose, enter a BDT budget, validate component compatibility, and generate optimized builds using live retailer data and scoring logic.
core_goals: Guide users through purpose-based PC build planning
Allocate BDT budgets intelligently across component categories
Validate hardware compatibility before a build is finalized
Rank and recommend top-performing, value-conscious builds
Provide live retailer pricing, watchlists, and price history
Support authenticated users with saved builds and dashboard tools
Offer AI-assisted build guidance through a chatbot proxy
Provide admin tools for managing components and pricing data

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows users to register, log in, and log out with session and JWT-based authentication.
user_flows: POST /myproject/register.php with valid name, email, password, confirm_password, and csrf_token -> Receive 302 redirect to /myproject/login.php -> POST /myproject/login.php with valid email, password, and csrf_token -> Receive 302 redirect to dashboard.php with authenticated session and JWT cookie

POST /myproject/register.php with missing or invalid fields -> Receive 200 with validation errors on the registration page -> POST /myproject/login.php with incorrect password -> Receive 200 with error message and no authenticated session
GET /myproject/logout.php with an authenticated session -> Receive 302 redirect to index.php with session destroyed and JWT cookie cleared
GET /myproject/logout.php without authentication -> Receive 401 unauthorized due to protected route

features.name: Component Store API
features.description: Returns filtered component listings from the internal store data for authenticated users.
user_flows: POST /myproject/api/get_components.php with valid session cookie and category=GPU, budget_max=50000 -> Receive 200 with an array of matching component objects including price, benchmark score, stock status, and retailer
POST /myproject/api/get_components.php without a valid session cookie -> Receive 401 unauthorized
POST /myproject/api/get_components.php with valid session cookie but no filters -> Receive 200 with a broader component list
POST /myproject/api/get_components.php with invalid filter values -> Receive 200 with an empty or limited result set based on query matching rules

features.name: Compatibility Check API
features.description: Checks selected components against hardware rules such as socket match, RAM generation, PSU headroom, and case fit.
user_flows: POST /myproject/api/check_compatibility.php with valid session cookie and a full components map containing CPU, Motherboard, GPU, RAM, and PSU IDs -> Receive 200 with compatible=true and an empty issues array when parts match
POST /myproject/api/check_compatibility.php with valid session cookie and mismatched CPU/Motherboard socket IDs -> Receive 200 with compatible=false and issues describing the socket conflict
POST /myproject/api/check_compatibility.php without a valid session cookie -> Receive 401 unauthorized
POST /myproject/api/check_compatibility.php with malformed component IDs payload -> Receive 200 with compatibility issues returned from validation logic

features.name: Save Build API
features.description: Persists a finalized build for the authenticated user and creates component junction records.
user_flows: POST /myproject/api/save_build.php with valid session cookie, an array of component IDs, total_bdt, score, purpose, name, fps, and wattage -> Receive 200 with success=true and a build_id
POST /myproject/api/save_build.php with valid session cookie but invalid build data such as missing component IDs or non-numeric totals -> Receive 400 invalid build data
POST /myproject/api/save_build.php without a valid session cookie -> Receive 401 unauthorized
POST /myproject/api/save_build.php with a non-empty components array but mismatched totals/score values -> Receive 400 invalid build data

features.name: Delete Build API
features.description: Deletes a build owned by the authenticated user and protects the action with CSRF validation.
user_flows: POST /myproject/api/delete_build.php with valid session cookie, a build_id owned by the user, and a valid csrf_token -> Receive 302 redirect to dashboard.php after deletion
POST /myproject/api/delete_build.php with valid session cookie but an invalid csrf_token -> Receive 403 CSRF mismatch
POST /myproject/api/delete_build.php without a valid session cookie -> Receive 401 unauthorized
POST /myproject/api/delete_build.php with a build_id not owned by the current user -> Receive 403 forbidden or equivalent access denial

features.name: Watchlist API
features.description: Adds or removes a component from the authenticated user's watchlist.
user_flows: POST /myproject/api/watchlist.php with valid session cookie, action=add, and a valid component_id -> Receive 200 with success=true, updated count, and action=add
POST /myproject/api/watchlist.php with valid session cookie, action=remove, and a valid component_id -> Receive 200 with success=true, updated count, and action=remove
POST /myproject/api/watchlist.php without a valid session cookie -> Receive 401 unauthorized
POST /myproject/api/watchlist.php with missing or invalid action/component_id parameters -> Receive 400 invalid parameters

features.name: Price History API
features.description: Provides historical price labels and values for a selected component over a chosen date range.
user_flows: GET /myproject/api/price_history.php?component_id=123&range=90 with valid session cookie -> Receive 200 with labels and values arrays for Chart.js
GET /myproject/api/price_history.php?range=90 with valid session cookie but missing component_id -> Receive 400 component_id required
GET /myproject/api/price_history.php?component_id=123&range=30 without a valid session cookie -> Receive 401 unauthorized
GET /myproject/api/price_history.php?component_id=123&range=999 with valid session cookie -> Receive 200 with adjusted or empty chart data depending on supported range handling

features.name: Chatbot Proxy API
features.description: Proxies user messages to Anthropic Claude for AI-assisted PC build guidance while enforcing rate limits.
user_flows: POST /myproject/api/chatbot_proxy.php with valid session cookie, message text, and optional history array -> Receive 200 with a reply string from the Claude API proxy
POST /myproject/api/chatbot_proxy.php without a valid session cookie -> Receive 401 unauthorized
POST /myproject/api/chatbot_proxy.php repeatedly until the hourly limit is exceeded -> Receive 429 rate limit exceeded
POST /myproject/api/chatbot_proxy.php with valid session cookie but upstream API failure -> Receive 500 API error

features.name: Budget Allocator
features.description: Splits a total BDT budget across component categories according to the selected purpose profile.
user_flows: Use the purpose profile in the build wizard and submit a total budget in BDT -> Receive category allocation values based on the selected profile percentages
Submit a gaming budget allocation request with a valid total budget -> Receive larger GPU and CPU allocations than office or general profiles
Provide an unsupported or missing purpose value in the budget workflow -> Receive fallback or validation behavior based on the allocation logic
Enter a non-numeric or negative budget in the budget workflow -> Receive validation failure before allocation is produced

features.name: Build Scoring Engine
features.description: Scores candidate builds using performance, value, and availability factors to produce ranked recommendations.
user_flows: Submit a valid build candidate set and purpose to the build scoring flow -> Receive ranked build output where top candidates are sorted by composite score
Submit builds with strong benchmark scores and in-stock parts -> Receive higher composite scores due to performance and availability weighting
Submit incomplete build data or invalid component combinations -> Receive reduced ranking quality or rejected build candidates in scoring output
Compare two valid builds with different BDT totals -> Receive value-weighted ranking that reflects performance per budget

features.name: Admin — Component CRUD
features.description: Lets administrators add, edit, or delete component catalogue entries and update pricing or stock data.
user_flows: POST /myproject/admin/components.php with valid admin session, action=save, and component details -> Receive 302 redirect after the component is saved
POST /myproject/admin/components.php with valid admin session, action=delete, and component id -> Receive 302 redirect after deletion
POST /myproject/admin/components.php with a non-admin authenticated session -> Receive 403 non-admin access denied
POST /myproject/admin/prices.php with valid admin session and arrays of component_id, price, and stock_status values -> Receive 302 redirect after bulk update
POST /myproject/admin/prices.php with a non-admin authenticated session -> Receive 403 non-admin access denied

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Register, login and logout. Stores users in the `user` table with bcrypt passwords. Issues a JWT HttpOnly cookie and PHP session on success.

endpoints.description: Authenticate user with email + password. Supports legacy plain-text password upgrade to bcrypt.

response_schema.200: Re-render login page with error message on failure

endpoints.description: Create new user account with name, email, password, confirm_password.
Destroy session and clear JWT cookie.

features.name: Component Store API
features.description: Returns paginated/filtered component list from `component` + `storeavailability` + `store` JOIN.

endpoints.description: Fetch components filtered by category and max budget.

response_schema.200: array of component objects with id, name, category, price_bdt, benchmark_score, stock_status, retailer

features.name: Compatibility Check API
features.description: Validates a set of component IDs against 8 hardware rules (socket, RAM gen, PSU headroom, etc.).

endpoints.description: Check compatibility for a map of category->component_id.

features.name: Save Build API
features.description: Saves a finalized build to the `build` table and creates junction rows in `buildcomponent`.

endpoints.description: Persist a build for the authenticated user.

features.name: Delete Build API
features.description: Deletes a saved build owned by the authenticated user.

endpoints.description: Delete a build by build_id for the current user.

features.name: Watchlist API
features.description: Add or remove a component from the authenticated user's watchlist.

features.name: Price History API
features.description: Returns price trend data for a component from the `pricetracking` table.

endpoints.description: Fetch price history for a component over a date range.

features.name: Chatbot Proxy API
features.description: Proxies messages to Anthropic Claude API with rate limiting stored in `chatbot_rate_limits` table.

endpoints.description: Send a user message to Claude and return AI response.

features.name: Budget Allocator
features.description: Pure PHP function that splits a BDT budget across component categories by purpose profile percentages.

features.name: Build Scoring Engine
features.description: Composite algorithm scoring builds on performance (60%), value (30%), availability (10%).

features.name: Admin — Component CRUD
features.description: Admin-only pages for managing components (add/edit/delete) and updating prices/stock.

endpoints.description: Add or edit a component (admin only).
Bulk-update price and stock status in storeavailability.

known_limitations.issue: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not configured — chatbot returns 401 invalid x-api-key
known_limitations.impact: Chatbot feature non-functional without real API key

known_limitations.issue: pricetracking table empty on fresh install
known_limitations.impact: Price history chart returns empty arrays

known_limitations.issue: Component benchmark_score/tdp_watts not seeded for all components
known_limitations.impact: Compatibility checks may pass trivially due to missing spec data

known_limitations.issue: SMTP not configured — password reset not implemented
